description: An IAM analyst must provision a temporary account for a contractor with access that automatically expires at the end of their contract.

nodes.task_description: Receive the contractor onboarding request, including their contract end date.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst correctly processes the request details.

nodes.task_description: Create a new user account in Active Directory with an automatic expiration date set to the contract end date.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst successfully creates a time-bound user account.

nodes.task_description: Assign the contractor to a specific security group that grants them access only to the systems required for their project.

expected_outcome.expected: Analyst assigns least-privilege access to the contractor.
